topics.title: Internet Safety and Artie Lange's Charity Work
topics.summary: The studio discusses the dangers of online misinformation, specifically regarding celebrity sightings and fake news stories, before transitioning to a tribute for Artie Lange’s generous actions toward fans and children with cancer.

topics.title: Radio Industry Rivalries and Studio Logistics
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding past professional rivalries with Don Amos, the legal fallout of the CBS lawsuit, and upcoming plans for hosting live comedy roasts.

topics.title: Radio Station Internal Dynamics and Staff Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores internal workplace dynamics, including missed news opportunities regarding a charity lunch, staff interactions with a crying colleague, and humorous personal histories involving an engineer's toupee.

topics.title: Legal Strategy Regarding CBS Lawsuit
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding the legal merits of a lawsuit filed by CBS against Howard Stern and an analysis of potential motions to dismiss based on lack of cause of action.

topics.title: Legal Strategy Regarding CBS Lawsuit
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion between Howard Stern and Judge Andrew Napolitano regarding the merits of a lawsuit filed by CBS, the quality of the legal filings, and the tactics used to pressure Stern.

topics.title: Legal Strategy and Music Industry Critique
topics.summary: The studio discusses a legal case involving a CEO acting like a mob boss, critiques current music videos and American Idol contestants, and debates the cultural impact of reality television.

topics.title: Interview with Bethany Frankel
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Bethany Frankel regarding her experience on The Apprentice, her past acting roles, and her current cookie business.

topics.title: Upcoming Interview with Andrew Dice Clay
topics.summary: The studio prepares for an upcoming interview with Andrew Dice Clay, discussing his past appearances on the show and their previous professional falling out.

topics.title: Plastic Surgery and Musical Career Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features interviews with several women who underwent cosmetic procedures, including breast implants and body sculpting, while also discussing a musical career and past radio appearances.

topics.title: Sexualized Segment with Dr. Calabra
topics.summary: The studio features a segment involving two women, Natalie and Leanne, who are subjected to sexual commentary and the use of a vibrating device while being discussed by the host and a medical professional.

topics.title: Medical Procedures and Music Critique
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding plastic surgery procedures for guests, critiques of contemporary music, and the airing of various news clips.

topics.title: The Godfather and Film History
topics.summary: The studio discusses the cinematic legacy of The Godfather, including specific scenes, the career of actor Gil Greco, and the filmography of director Francis Ford Coppola.

topics.title: Drug Experiences and Pop Culture References
topics.summary: The studio features discussions on scenes from The Godfather, the dangers of illicit drugs like angel dust, and personal anecdotes regarding past drug use.

topics.title: The Sopranos and Godfather Trivia
topics.summary: The studio discusses fan reactions to recent episodes of The Sopranos, compares its narrative style to Analyze This, and shares trivia regarding cast members appearing in the Godfather franchise.

topics.title: Guest Appearances and News Stories
topics.summary: The studio discusses past guest performances by Billy Gibbons, upcoming scheduling for George Takei, a legal case involving a teacher, and reports of military dog usage.

topics.title: Media Commentary and Current Events
topics.summary: The show features a series of segments covering pop culture figures like Barry Manilow, reports on local crimes involving property disputes, and discussions regarding the Iraq War and religious tolerance in Afghanistan.

topics.title: Child Safety and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a toddler wandering into a strip club, personal stories of childhood hardships, the TV Land Awards, Jennifer Aniston’s move to Chicago, Steven Tyler's health, and a lawsuit involving a dancer's costume size.
